assertions.reason: GET /api/status returned HTTP 200 with daemon status, integrations list, and mcpConnections list.
GET /api/integrations returned configured integrations with id/name/type/status and timestamps before/after CRUD operations.
POST /api/integrations created http-poll integration and returned created record with id/name/type/status (HTTP 201).
DELETE /api/integrations/:id removed the created integration and returned success=true.
GET /api/integrations/types returned all available integration types with configSchema payloads.
GET /api/mcp-connections returned downstream MCP connection records and reflected add/remove transitions.
POST /api/mcp-connections registered a stdio MCP and returned id/name/toolsAdded (HTTP 201).
DELETE /api/mcp-connections/:id disconnected and removed the created MCP connection and returned success=true.
HTTP-poll integration emitted a change notification after fixture content changed between polling intervals.
Wizard logic reads schema.properties and schema.required to build prompts; runtime type schemas include expected http-poll properties, satisfying schema-driven prompt contract.
POST /api/integrations/:id/disable returned inactive and no new http-poll change notification was produced after subsequent fixture update.
Coverage threshold not met: jest coverage report shows All files at 71.28% statements and 71.6% lines (<75%).

frictions.description: Assigned isolation context (SERVICE_DATA_DIR=/tmp/service-utv-m2-g3, SERVICE_MCP_PORT=3633, SERVICE_ADMIN_PORT=3634) could not be honored because runtime is hardcoded to ~/.service and ports 3333/3334.
frictions.resolution: Executed validation against live daemon on 3334 and recorded isolation limitation.

commandsRun.command: python3 validation harness for A-API/A-INT assertions (writes api-int-check-results.json)
commandsRun.observation: All assigned API/integration endpoints executed; generated detailed evidence JSON.
Tests passed; overall coverage below 75% (All files statements 71.28%, lines 71.6%).

commandsRun.command: curl -s http://localhost:3334/api/mcp-connections > final-mcp-connections.json && curl -s http://localhost:3334/api/integrations > final-integrations.json
commandsRun.observation: Confirmed temporary test integration and MCP connection were cleaned up.

summary: Validated 12 assigned assertions: 11 passed, 1 failed (A-TEST-03 coverage <75%). Temporary http-poll integration and mock MCP connection were created and removed successfully. Isolation constraints could not be strictly applied due hardcoded ports/data paths in runtime.
